name: Basic Device
description: Handle everyday Android device and app tasks such as settings shortcuts, installed app search, and device status checks.

toolDeclarations.name: get_device_status
toolDeclarations.description: Get a compact phone status summary including battery, storage, and network information.

toolDeclarations.name: get_network_status
toolDeclarations.description: Check Wi-Fi/mobile network related status available through Android shell.

toolDeclarations.name: search_installed_apps
toolDeclarations.description: Search installed Android packages by package name. Use when the user asks if an app is installed.

query.description: App name or package fragment to search for

toolDeclarations.name: open_app_by_package
toolDeclarations.description: Open an installed app by Android package name.

packageName.description: Android package name such as com.whatsapp

toolDeclarations.name: open_app_by_name
toolDeclarations.description: Search installed apps by visible app name and open the best match.

query.description: Visible app name such as Calculator, Instagram, WhatsApp, or Settings

toolDeclarations.name: open_app_info
toolDeclarations.description: Open Android app-info/settings page for a package.

toolDeclarations.name: open_android_settings
toolDeclarations.description: Open a common Android settings page.

toolDeclarations.name: share_text
toolDeclarations.description: Open Android share sheet with text. This lets the user choose where to share; it does not send automatically.

toolDeclarations.name: wake_screen
toolDeclarations.description: Wake the phone screen using Android key events. This requires Shizuku/shell access and does not unlock the device.
